name: Creamy Cheesecake (the Birthday Cheesecake)
recipeInstructions:
For the crust: Mix the 2 cups of sugar with the graham cracker crumbs. Add the melted butter and press into a 9-inch springform pan (the mixture should rise at least 1 inch up the sides). Chill the crust in the freezer while you prepare the filling.
Filling: Preheat the oven to 450°F. Beat the cream cheese with sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and cornstarch until smooth using a food processor or whisk. Mix in the sour cream and almond extract. Pour the mixture into the chilled crust.
Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F. Reduce the temperature to 200°F and bake for an additional 45 minutes. Turn off the oven completely and let the cheesecake stand with the door slightly ajar for 2 or 3 more hours before chilling.
